---
title: "Contact"
description: "Contact links, profiles, and visitor statistics for Shunyu Wu."
toc: false
---

::: {.section-note}
For collaboration, seminar invitations, or research discussions, email is the preferred channel.
:::

## Contact

- Email: [shunyuwu@sjtu.edu.cn](mailto:shunyuwu@sjtu.edu.cn)
- Google Scholar: [profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=keb-zTsAAAAJ&hl=zh-CN&oi=ao)
- ORCID: [0000-0001-9856-2148](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9856-2148)
- GitHub: [ShunyuWu-Shaun](https://github.com/ShunyuWu-Shaun)

## Affiliation

- Shanghai Jiao Tong University
- Department of Control Science and Engineering

## Visitor Statistics

::: {.visitor-grid}
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Page Views</span><span class="value" id="visitor-pv">--</span></div>
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Unique Visitors</span><span class="value" id="visitor-uv">--</span></div>
<div class="visitor-stat"><span class="label">Current Visitor Region</span><span class="value" id="visitor-geo">Detecting...</span></div>
:::

<div class="visitor-counter">
<img src="https://s01.flagcounter.com/count2/shunyuwu2026/bg_FFFFFF/txt_334155/border_CBD5E1/columns_4/maxflags_20/viewers_1/labels_1/pageviews_1/flags_0/percent_0/" alt="Visitor country distribution counter" />
</div>

## Privacy Notice

This website intentionally omits sensitive personal information (phone number, date of birth, ID, and home address).
